Title: Main Program Calls Routine 1
Preconditions: Main Program is initialized and ready to execute.
Test Steps:
1. Main Program initiates execution.
2. Main Program calls Routine 1.
Expected Result: Routine 1 is executed successfully.

Title: Routine 1 Calls Routine 1.1
Preconditions: Routine 1 is called by Main Program.
Test Steps:
1. Routine 1 executes.
2. Routine 1 calls Routine 1.1.
Expected Result: Routine 1.1 is executed successfully.

Title: Routine 1 Calls Routine 1.2
Preconditions: Routine 1 is called by Main Program.
Test Steps:
1. Routine 1 executes.
2. Routine 1 calls Routine 1.2.
Expected Result: Routine 1.2 is executed successfully.

Title: Routine 2 Calls Routine 3.1
Preconditions: Routine 2 is called by Main Program.
Test Steps:
1. Routine 2 executes.
2. Routine 2 calls Routine 3.1.
Expected Result: Routine 3.1 is executed successfully.

Title: Routine 3 Calls Routine 3.1
Preconditions: Routine 3 is called by Routine 2.
Test Steps:
1. Routine 3 executes.
2. Routine 3 calls Routine 3.1.
Expected Result: Routine 3.1 is executed successfully.

Title: Routine 3 Calls Routine 3.2
Preconditions: Routine 3 is called by Routine 2.
Test Steps:

2. Routine 3 calls Routine 3.2.
Expected Result: Routine 3.2 is executed successfully.

Title: User Creation
Preconditions: System is initialized and ready to accept user creation requests.
Test Data:
- Valid username: "testuser"
- Valid email: "test@example.com"
- Valid password: "password123"
- Name: "John Doe"
- Surname: "Doe"
- Position: "Developer"
Test Steps:
1. User attempts to create a new account using valid credentials.
2. System verifies the provided information.
3. System creates a new user entry in the database.
Expected Result: User is created successfully and can log in using the provided credentials.

Title: Invalid User Creation
Preconditions: System is initialized and ready to accept user creation requests.
Test Data:
- Invalid username: ""
- Invalid email: "invalidemail"
- Invalid password: ""
- Name: "John Doe"
- Surname: "Doe"
- Position: "Developer"
Test Steps:
1. User attempts to create a new account using invalid credentials.
2. System verifies the provided information.
3. System rejects the request due to invalid credentials.
Expected Result: User creation fails and an appropriate error message is displayed.

Title: Successful Login
Preconditions: User has registered and entered valid credentials.
Test Steps:
1. User enters valid login credentials.
2. System verifies the provided information.
3. System grants access.
Expected Result: User is logged in successfully.

Title: Failed Login
Preconditions: User has registered but entered invalid credentials.
Test Steps:
1. User enters invalid login credentials.
2. System verifies the provided information.
3. System denies access.
Expected Result: User is denied access and prompted to re-enter credentials.

Title: Successful Query Execution
Preconditions: System is initialized and ready to execute queries.
Test Data: - Valid query: SELECT * FROM table WHERE condition
Test Steps:
1. System receives a valid query.
2. System executes the query.
3. System confirms the query was executed successfully.
Expected Result: Query is executed successfully and returns expected results.

Title: Failed Query Execution
Preconditions: System is initialized and ready to execute queries.
Test Steps:
1. System receives an invalid query.
2. System attempts to execute the query.
3. System detects the query failed.
4. System sends an error message.
Expected Result: Query fails and an appropriate error message is displayed.

Preconditions: System is initialized and ready to create objects.
Test Steps:
1. System receives valid object details.
2. System inserts the object data into the database.
3. System confirms the query was executed successfully.
Expected Result: Object is created successfully and can be retrieved from the database.
